gist.headline: Green checkmarks restored
gist.blurb: Cleaned up our test suite by fixing 25 failing tests, updating snapshots, and adjusting tier refill logic.
gist.summary: Fixed 25 failing integration tests in the API gateway by updating mock snapshots and correcting test logic for paid models and tier refills.
gist.impact: Ensures our continuous integration pipeline remains reliable and accurately reflects current API behavior.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot sweeping up broken test tubes or fixing a glowing green checkmark. Nomnom creature eating bad test snapshots.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor hat, sweeping up broken digital test tubes. A round tan mochi-ball creature happily eats bad code snapshots. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
